languages.text: "Я приказа{mf|л|ла} починить его, а не перечить мне! Выполняй".
"I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."
languages.original_text: "Я приказа{mf|л|ла} починить его, а не перечить мне! Выполняй".

traits.locale_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."
"I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."
"I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

languages.text: 「修理するように言ったのは君だ、俺と口論するんじゃない！今すぐしろ！」
languages.original_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

traits.locale_text: 「修理するように言ったのは君だ、俺と口論するんじゃない！今すぐしろ！」

languages.text: "Sana onu tamir etmeni emrettim, benimle tartışmanı değil! Şimdi yap şu işi."
languages.original_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

traits.locale_text: "Sana onu tamir etmeni emrettim, benimle tartışmanı değil! Şimdi yap şu işi."

languages.text: «¡Le he ordenado repararlo, no discutir conmigo! Hágalo».
languages.original_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

traits.locale_text: «¡Le he ordenado repararlo, no discutir conmigo! Hágalo».

languages.text: “我命令你修好它，不是让你跟我争辩！现在就动手。”
languages.original_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

traits.locale_text: “我命令你修好它，不是让你跟我争辩！现在就动手。”

languages.text: « Je vous ai dit de le réparer, pas de contester mon ordre ! Exécution. »
languages.original_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous ai dit de le réparer, pas de contester mon ordre ! Exécution. »

languages.text: "Ich habe Euch befohlen, ihn zu reparieren, nicht, mit mir zu diskutieren! Gehorcht!"
languages.original_text: "I ordered you to repair it, not argue with me! Now do it."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Euch befohlen, ihn zu reparieren, nicht, mit mir zu diskutieren! Gehorcht!"
